description: Update all release documentation for v1.3: Release Notes, FAQ, SECURITY.md, Roadmap, Release Checklist, Current State, and dev log
steps: Update planning/07_RELEASE_NOTES_DRAFT.md: add v1.2.0 section (data safety, season transfers, player card v2, tournament polish, tags/attachments/custom fields, themes/customization, status bar/welcome/sorting) and v1.3.0 section (coach workflow: tasks with priorities/deadlines, training plans with exercises, Coach tab with analytics, coach plan integration in player card)

Update FAQ.txt: add 9 new Q&A entries in Russian covering: backup export/import, season transfers, player tags, file attachments, custom fields, theme/customization, creating coach tasks, creating training plans, viewing overdue tasks

Rewrite SECURITY.md: replace default GitHub template with real information - supported versions (v1.3.x), local data storage (SQLite), no network communication, restore points for data protection, how to report issues

Update planning/02_ROADMAP.md: mark v1.2 and v1.3 as completed (add checkmarks or 'Выполнено' labels), add v1.4 section with ideas (improved tournament analytics, additional import formats, configurable reports, multi-profile support, auto-updates)

Update 10_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md: add new v1.3 gate section with items for coach workflow tests, theme system tests, workspace extensions tests, season transfer tests, backup/restore tests, mypy 46 files count, 151+ test count, and latest run results
Update planning/03_CURRENT_STATE.md: change 'Что Дальше' section to indicate release-ready v1.3 status, update date
Create logs/general/2025-01-16-release-v13-preparation.md: add dev log entry about release preparation activities (code cleanup, docs update, verification)
acceptance_criteria: planning/07_RELEASE_NOTES_DRAFT.md contains v1.2.0 and v1.3.0 sections with all listed features
FAQ.txt contains 9 new Q&A entries covering backup, seasons, tags, attachments, custom fields, themes, coach tasks, training plans, overdue tasks
SECURITY.md no longer contains '5.1.x' placeholder text and has real project security info
planning/02_ROADMAP.md has v1.2 and v1.3 marked as completed and v1.4 section exists
10_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md has a v1.3 gates section with coach/theme/workspace/season/backup test gates
verification: python -m pytest -q -rs (ensure no test references broken doc paths)
